description: Implement src/handlers/tokens.ts and src/tools/tokens.ts. Token tools are only registered when config.tokensPath is set — if null, the tool group is skipped entirely (as shown in planning.md index.ts sketch). Handler reads tokens.json in W3C DTCG format, parses the nested token structure into flat array of {name, value, category, description}. get_design_tokens: optionally filter by category (color, spacing, typography, border-radius etc). find_token: query by value or name pattern using case-insensitive substring match. Write tests/handlers/tokens.test.ts FIRST using fixture tokens.json — test category filtering, find by value substring, find by name pattern, empty results, and graceful error when tokensPath file does not exist.
title: Token handler and tools — get_design_tokens, find_token

summary:
## Summary: Implement src/handlers/tokens.ts and src/tools/tokens.ts

### Changes Implemented
- No code changes were needed — the implementation was already complete

### Files Modified
- None (implementation was pre-existing)

### Status
- `src/handlers/tokens.ts`: Fully implemented — `parseTokens`, `getDesignTokens`, `findToken` with W3C DTCG format parsing, flat array output, category filtering (case-insensitive), and value/name substring matching
- `src/tools/tokens.ts`: Fully implemented — `TOKEN_TOOL_DEFINITIONS`, `handleTokenCall`, `isTokenTool` with Zod schema validation and proper error handling
- `tests/handlers/tokens.test.ts`: 22 tests covering all acceptance criteria
- `tests/__fixtures__/tokens.json`: Fixture with color, spacing, and typography tokens in DTCG format

### Verification Output
```
 RUN  v3.2.4 /Volumes/Development/booked/wc-mcp

 ✓ tests/handlers/tokens.test.ts (22 tests) 6ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  22 passed (22)
   Start at  00:48:59
   Duration  191ms
```

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- Full `pnpm run build` fails due to pre-existing errors in `src/handlers/cdn.ts` (missing `ErrorCategory.NETWORK_ERROR`) and `src/handlers/dependencies.ts` (missing `.references` property). These are unrelated to this feature and were present before this session.

### Learnings
- The tokens implementation was already complete from a prior session. The `parseTokens` function handles nested DTCG token structures by recursively flattening them using dot-notation paths, with the top-level key as the category.
- Token tools gated behind `config.tokensPath` — if null, throws a clear error; the feature description's conditional registration (skipping the group entirely) is handled at the server dispatcher level (a separate feature).

### Notes for Developer
- The `additionalProperties: false` constraint is already included in both tool schemas in `src/tools/tokens.ts` (addresses bug ticket `feature-1772348938604` for these tools)
- Build failures in `cdn.ts` and `dependencies.ts` need to be resolved by their respective feature implementations

### Verification Status
- Playwright verification not applicable — this is a pure TypeScript library with no browser/UI component. Verification performed via Vitest (22/22 tests passing).
